name: ai-dev-kit
description: Portable agentic-development skill library: lifecycle skills, a per-project adapter contract, and a cross-platform installer.

hooks.policy: advise, never block — hooks inject context; the agent decides

handlers.fires: package.json edits; pm add/update/upgrade or install-with-args commands

skills.name: checkpoint
skills.summary: Commit + push pending work, judge context health, then continue or hand off with a paste-ready resume prompt.

automation.reviewed: Step 2: deliberately not hook-automated — standing agreement + skill triggers cover the cadence; a Stop-hook nag would be noise

skills.name: doc-audit
skills.summary: Keep docs, agent context, persistent memory, and showcase docs accurate and token-lean; archive instead of delete.

skills.name: project-audit
skills.summary: Score every feature group /100 against a best-available bar; verify docs ↔ code; emit a prioritized backlog.
triggers: what's missing to make this perfect

skills.name: tidy
skills.summary: Prune the unbounded local build cache; surface (never auto-run) orphaned dev servers, stale e2e users, dangling Docker images.

automation.existing: cache prune at checkpoint + pre-push backstop
automation.reviewed: Step 2: no Claude hook — the existing cadence already covers it

skills.name: dep-check
skills.summary: Registry-verify a dependency before adding/upgrading: real version, dist-tags, release-age window, pin policy, peers, standing holds.

automation.active: PostToolUse (Edit|Write|Bash) → hooks/dep-check-nudge.mjs — injects the dep-check reminder on package.json edits / pm installs

skills.name: live-verify
skills.summary: Full gate, then a fresh prod build on a dedicated port, then drive the affected flow and observe real output.

composition.defersTo: project verify skill (built-in verify bootstraps one)

automation.active: PreToolUse (Bash, if git *) → hooks/live-verify-reminder.mjs — injects the live-verify reminder before commits
